sentence: Lo cel no és clar en aquest jorn.
ipa: ˈlɔ ˈsɛl ˈnɔ ˈes ˈklaɾ ˈɛn aˈkɛsd ˈdʒɔrn
gloss_en: The sky is not clear on this day.
notes: Old Catalan article ⟨lo⟩ [lɔ] and open-mid ⟨e/o⟩ [ˈsɛl],[ˈnɔ] per moll1952; voiced affricate ⟨j⟩ [dʒ] 'jorn' and final-⟨r⟩ retention 'clar' per rasico1982.

sentence: Null hom no pot dir ço que sent al cor.
ipa: ˈnuʎ ˈɔm ˈnɔ ˈpɔd ˈdiɾ ˈsɔ ˈkɛ ˈsɛnt ˈal ˈkɔɾ
gloss_en: No man can say what he feels in his heart.
notes: Archaic 'null hom' (no man) and ⟨ç⟩ [s] 'ço' per moll1952; palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'null' and open-mid vowels per rasico1982.

sentence: Moltes gents vengueren a la ciutat.
ipa: ˈmɔltez ˈðʒɛnz veˈŋɡɛɾen ˈa ˈla siˈwtat
gloss_en: Many people came to the city.
notes: Preterite 'vengueren' and plural 'gents' per moll1952; voiced ⟨g⟩ affricate [dʒ] 'gents', velar nasal [ŋ] 'vengueren' and final ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] (sandhi) per rasico1982.

sentence: Lo rei manà bastir un gran palau.
ipa: ˈlɔ ˈrɛj maˈna βaˈstiɾ ˈun ˈɡɾan paˈlaw
gloss_en: The king ordered a great palace to be built.
notes: Article ⟨lo⟩ and infinitive 'bastir' per moll1952; open-mid [ˈrɛj],[ˈɡɾan] and tap/trill contrast per rasico1982.

sentence: Aytal cosa no és bona ne profitosa.
ipa: aˈtal ˈkɔza ˈnɔ ˈez ˈβɔna ˈnɛ pɾofiˈtɔza
gloss_en: Such a thing is neither good nor profitable.
notes: Archaic 'aytal' (such) and conjunction 'ne' (nor) per moll1952; open-mid ⟨o⟩ [ˈkɔza],[ˈβɔna] and final ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] 'és bona' (sandhi) per rasico1982.

sentence: La dona plorava sobre lo lit.
ipa: ˈla ˈðɔna ploˈɾava ˈsɔβɾe ˈlɔ ˈlit
gloss_en: The woman was weeping over the bed.
notes: Article ⟨lo⟩ [lɔ] and phonemic ⟨v⟩ [v] 'plorava' per moll1952; open-mid ⟨o⟩ [ˈðɔna],[ˈsɔβɾe] per rasico1982.

sentence: Aquell cavaller amava una donzella.
ipa: aˈkɛʎ kavaˈʎɛɾ aˈmava ˈuna ðoˈnzɛʎa
gloss_en: That knight loved a maiden.
notes: Old lexicon 'cavaller','donzella' and voiced affricate ⟨z⟩ 'donzella' per moll1952; palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'cavaller','donzella' and phonemic ⟨v⟩ [v] 'amava' per rasico1982.

sentence: Lo savi hom parla ab gran seny.
ipa: ˈlɔ ˈsavi ˈɔm ˈparla ˈab ˈɡɾan ˈsɛɲ
gloss_en: The wise man speaks with great sense.
notes: Preposition 'ab' (with) and 'seny' (sense) per moll1952; palatal nasal ⟨ny⟩ [ɲ] 'seny' and open-mid [ˈɔm],[ˈsɛɲ] per rasico1982.

sentence: Les naus partiren del port a l'alba.
ipa: ˈlɛz ˈnaws paˈrtiɾen ˈdɛl ˈpɔrt ˈa ˈlalβa
gloss_en: The ships left the port at dawn.
notes: Plural 'les naus' and 'a l'alba' per moll1952; preterite 'partiren', open-mid [ˈpɔrt] and final ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] 'les naus' (sandhi) per rasico1982.

sentence: Molts jorns passaren ans que tornàs.
ipa: ˈmɔlz ˈðʒɔrns paˈsaɾen ˈans ˈkɛ toˈrnas
gloss_en: Many days passed before he returned.
notes: Preterite 'passaren' and imperfect subjunctive 'tornàs' per moll1952; open-mid ⟨o⟩ [ˈmɔlz],[ˈðʒɔrns] with voiced affricate [dʒ] 'jorns' per rasico1982.

sentence: Lo senyor donà terres e viles als seus.
ipa: ˈlɔ seˈɲɔɾ ðoˈna ˈtɛrez ˈɛ ˈvilez ˈals ˈsɛws
gloss_en: The lord gave lands and villages to his people.
notes: Article ⟨lo⟩, conjunction 'e' (and) and 'viles' per moll1952; palatal nasal ⟨ny⟩ [ɲ] 'senyor' and final ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] 'terres','viles' (sandhi) per rasico1982.

sentence: Vengren les pluges e cresqueren los rius.
ipa: ˈvɛŋɡɾen ˈlɛs ˈpludʒez ˈɛ kɾeˈskɛɾen ˈlɔz ˈriws
gloss_en: The rains came and the rivers rose.
notes: Preterite 'vengren','cresqueren' and 'e' (and) per moll1952; velar nasal [ŋ] 'vengren', voiced ⟨j⟩ [dʒ] 'pluges' and open-mid [ˈvɛŋɡɾen] per rasico1982.

sentence: Assí comença lo libre de les meravelles.
ipa: aˈsi koˈmɛnsa ˈlɔ ˈliβɾe ˈðɛ ˈlɛz meɾaˈvɛʎes
gloss_en: Here begins the book of marvels.
notes: Old ⟨libre⟩ (book) and 'meravelles' per moll1952; palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'meravelles', ⟨ç⟩ [s] 'comença' and open-mid vowels per rasico1982.

sentence: Lo foc cremava les cases de fusta.
ipa: ˈlɔ ˈfɔk kɾeˈmava ˈlɛs ˈkazez ˈðɛ ˈfusta
gloss_en: The fire was burning the wooden houses.
notes: Article ⟨lo⟩ and imperfect 'cremava' per moll1952; open-mid ⟨o⟩ [ˈfɔk], final ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] 'cases de' (sandhi) per rasico1982.

sentence: Digueren-li que lo comte era mort.
ipa: diˈɣɛɾen ˈli ˈkɛ ˈlɔ ˈkɔmte ˈɛɾa ˈmɔrt
gloss_en: They told him that the count was dead.
notes: Preterite 'digueren' and 'comte' (count) per moll1952; open-mid ⟨o⟩ [ˈkɔmte],[ˈmɔrt] and tap/trill per rasico1982.

sentence: Quants anys ha que no·l veés?
ipa: ˈkwanz ˈaɲz ˈa ˈkɛ ˈnɔ ˈl veˈes
gloss_en: How many years is it since you last saw him?
notes: Archaic clitic '·l' (enclitic 'lo') and 'veés' (saw) per moll1952; palatal nasal ⟨ny⟩ [ɲ] 'anys' and open-mid vowels per rasico1982.

sentence: Lo missatger portà novelles de la guerra.
ipa: ˈlɔ misaˈdʒɛɾ poˈrta noˈvɛʎez ˈðɛ ˈla ˈɣɛra
gloss_en: The messenger brought news of the war.
notes: Article ⟨lo⟩ and 'novelles' (news) per moll1952; palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'novelles', voiced ⟨g⟩ [dʒ] 'missatger' and tap/trill 'guerra' per rasico1982.

sentence: La verge estava en oració tota la nit.
ipa: ˈla ˈvɛrdʒe eˈstava ˈɛn oɾasiˈo ˈtɔta ˈla ˈnit
gloss_en: The virgin was in prayer all night long.
notes: Old ⟨verge⟩ and 'oració' with hiatus per moll1952; voiced ⟨g⟩ affricate [dʒ] 'verge', open-mid [ˈvɛrdʒe] and ⟨ó⟩ [o] per rasico1982.

sentence: Bé sabets vós que dic veritat.
ipa: ˈbe saˈβɛdz ˈvos ˈkɛ ˈðiɡ veɾiˈtat
gloss_en: You well know that I speak the truth.
notes: Archaic 2pl 'sabets','vós' and 'dic' (I say) per moll1952; phonemic ⟨v⟩ [v] 'vós','veritat' and final ⟨ts⟩ [dz] 'sabets' per rasico1982.

sentence: Lo fill del rei caçava cervos pel boscatge.
ipa: ˈlɔ ˈfiʎ ˈdɛl ˈrɛj kaˈsava ˈsɛrvos ˈpɛl βoˈskadʒe
gloss_en: The king's son hunted deer in the woodland.
notes: Article ⟨lo⟩, 'caçava' with ⟨ç⟩ [s] and 'boscatge' per moll1952; palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'fill', voiced ⟨tg⟩ [dʒ] 'boscatge' and open-mid [ˈsɛrvos] per rasico1982.
